title: cayratia lineata
intro: Cayratia lineata, also known as the Grape Ivy or Five-angled Cayratia, is a type of perennial vine native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Cayratia lineata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and infections.
